hooks.command:
ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git -C "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]:-$0}")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"
lw=$(grep "^LOOP_WEIGHT:" "$ROOT/.sessions/session_tokens.md" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); lw=${lw:-0}
st=$(grep "^SESSION_TOTAL:" "$ROOT/.sessions/session_tokens.md" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}' || echo 0)
ct=$(grep "^CHAT_TOTAL:" "$ROOT/.sessions/session_tokens.md" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}' || echo 0)
reset_marker=$(grep "^session_reset=" "$ROOT/.sessions/compact_state.md" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
if [ "$reset_marker" = "armed" ]; then
  lw=0; st=0
  printf "SESSION_TOTAL: 0\nCHAT_TOTAL: %s\nCACHE_READ: 0\nCACHE_WRITE: 0\nTURN_COUNT: 0\nLOOP_WEIGHT: 0\n" "$ct" > "$ROOT/.sessions/session_tokens.md"
  sed -i '' "s/^session_reset=armed/session_reset=consumed/" "$ROOT/.sessions/compact_state.md" 2>/dev/null || sed -i "s/^session_reset=armed/session_reset=consumed/" "$ROOT/.sessions/compact_state.md" 2>/dev/null
fi
if [ "${st:-0}" -gt 90000 ] 2>/dev/null || [ "${ct:-0}" -gt 120000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "[compact-STOP] HARD CEILING SESSION=$st CHAT=$ct — genuine token ceiling · write compact_state.md · STOP · /compact now"
elif [ "${ct:-0}" -gt 80000 ] 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "[compact-rec] CHAT_TOTAL=$ct>80k (real context size — PRIMARY signal) — surface a /compact RECOMMENDATION per C0.5 BC (Recommend/Why/MUST-vs-SHOULD=SHOULD/Resume brief/Your call). NOT a STOP — user decides"
elif [ "$lw" -gt 50 ] 2>/dev/null; then
  echo "[compact-rec] LOOP_WEIGHT=$lw>50 (SECONDARY: high tool-call count, not a token ceiling) — light hint: consider /compact at a natural breakpoint. No block"
fi
echo "[token-state] SESSION=${st} LOOP_W=${lw} CHAT=${ct} -- MUST use ONLY these values in footer (CFP-031: never cached/estimated)"
exit 0
ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" && python3 "$ROOT/scripts/learning_profile.py" analyze 2>/dev/null || true
